data.title: Whales dumped LINK and stETH, cashing out approximately $7.54 million
data.description: According to OnchainLens monitoring, the whale address 0xc6f7…e187 recently sold 163,990 LINK with a transaction amount of US$3.32 million and an average price of US$20.24; at the same time, it sold 1,074 stETH with a transaction amount of US$4.2 million and an average transaction price of US$3,917, with a total cash out of approximately US$7.54 million.

data.title: The crypto sector fell across the board, with BTC falling below $110,000 and ETH falling to $3,800 at one point.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market saw declines across the board, driven by factors such as a significant upward revision of US Q2 GDP to 3.8% and dampened expectations for interest rate cuts. Bitcoin (BTC) fell 2.63% in the 24-hour period, falling below $110,000. Meanwhile, Ethereum (ETH) plummeted 3.72%, briefly dipping to around $3,800. Furthermore, the DeFi sector led the decline, with a 4.98% drop. Within the sector, Aster (ASTER), which had previously seen significant gains, fell 21.05%. In other sectors, the Layer 2 sector fell 3.51%. Within the sector, Mantle (MNT) fell 4.08%, Optimism (OP) dropped 4.55%, and Linea (LINEA) fell 6.99%. The PayFi sector fell 4.06%, with XRP and Telcoin (TEL) falling 4.83% and 6.91%, respectively. The CeFi sector fell 4.37%, but OKB bucked the trend and rose 5.72%. The Meme sector fell 4.69%, with Pump.fun (PUMP) and MemeCore (M) falling 5.88% and 6.94%, respectively. The Layer 1 sector fell 4.69%, with Avalanche (AVAX) down 11.61%. The Crypto Sector Index, which reflects historical market trends, shows that the ssiNFT, ssiDePIN, and ssiCeFi indices fell 6.00%, 4.72%, and 4.62%, respectively.

data.title: VanEck to Meet with SEC Crypto Task Force, Covering ETF Tokenization and Staking Risks
data.description: According to Nate Geraci, President of The ETF Store, VanEck, a top-10 global ETF issuer, held a meeting today with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Crypto Task Force. The agenda included: discussing the applicability of the proposed universal listing standards for commodity and crypto ETFs to liquid collateralized tokens; examining liquidity risk policies and procedures for collateralized products; exploring the tokenization of private and registered funds, particularly the impact of ETF tokenization and the role of issuers; reviewing VanEck's global tokenization efforts; addressing decentralized finance and crypto asset regulation, including compliance issues related to security tokens and ICOs; and considering potential amendments to the Investment Advisers Act's custody rules, such as the use of multi-party computation (MPC) software for secure custody of digital assets.

data.title: Gate will list WorldAssets (INC) and launch a HODLer Airdrop
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will debut WorldAssets (INC) spot trading at 20:00 (UTC+8) on September 30th. The 302nd WorldAssets (INC) HODLer Airdrop is now open and ends at 19:00 (UTC+8) on September 30th. Users holding 1 GT can participate in the airdrop for free and receive a share of 40,000 INC.

data.title: Plasma Mainnet Lending Vault TVL Exceeds $1.4 Billion, APY Nearly 40%
data.description: According to official news, the TVL on the Plasma mainnet Lending Vault has exceeded US$1.4 billion, temporarily reported at US$1.402 billion, and the APY for depositing stablecoin USDT 0 is nearly 40%.

data.title: Du Jun: HYPE's buyback model cannot sustain a $45 billion valuation; the risks far outweigh the benefits
data.description: ABCDE co-founder Du Jun posted on the X platform that HYPE's buyback model isn't sufficient to support a fully diluted valuation (FDV) of $45 billion, arguing that the risks and rewards aren't balanced. He pointed out that even if Hyperliquid's market capitalization surpasses BNB, the theoretical profit potential is only about three times higher. The perpetual contract DEX market is highly competitive, with strong competitors. Furthermore, Hyperliquid has yet to experience a major compliance or security incident, and if any issues arise, the downside risk could be significant.

data.title: Hyperliquid's largest XPL long position begins to gradually close
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Yu Jin @EmberCN, the largest XPL long position holder on Hyperliquid has begun to gradually reduce positions and take profits.

data.title: Scilex Invests $150 Million in Datavault AI for Strategic Bitcoin Initiative
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed company Scilex has announced a strategic investment of $150 million in Datavault AI, focusing on Bitcoin. Scilex is set to acquire a total of 278,914,094 shares of Datavault common stock at an actual purchase price of $0.5378 per share. Of these, 15,000,000 shares will be issued upon the completion of Scilex's initial investment, while the remaining shares will be issued in the form of pre-financing warrants during the second phase.

Scilex aims to leverage its expertise in the biotechnology and pharmaceutical sectors to develop a potential trading platform for Real World Assets (RWA) within these industries. This strategic move is part of Scilex's broader plan to integrate advanced technologies into its operations, enhancing its capabilities in the biotech and pharma markets.

data.title: 221st Ethereum ACDE Meeting: Fusaka Testnet Upgrade to be Activated on October 1st
data.description: Christine Kim, Vice President of Research at Galaxy, summarized that at the 221st Ethereum Core Developers' Executive (ACDE) meeting, developers discussed the first public testnet upgrade, Fusaka, scheduled to activate on October 1st. Currently, four client teams have yet to release their respective versions. Once the testnet upgrade is complete, the Fusaka mainnet client will adjust the default block gas limit to 60 million gas. Furthermore, the EthPandaOps team plans to initiate the Holesky shadow fork tomorrow.

data.description: According to @lookonchain monitoring, a total of 15 addresses withdrew 406,117 ETH from Kraken, Galaxy Digital, BitGo and FalconX in the past two days, worth approximately US$1.6 billion.

data.title: Ethereum Developers Plan Fusaka Upgrade Activation on October 1
data.description:
According to PANews, the 221st Ethereum All Core Developers Execution (ACDE) meeting focused on the progress of the Fusaka upgrade public testnet. Although four client teams have yet to release their testnet versions, developers have unanimously agreed to activate the upgrade as scheduled on October 1.

The meeting also resolved to increase the default gas limit per block to 60 million following the Fusaka mainnet upgrade. Additionally, progress on testing related to the Glamsterdam upgrade's Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs) was discussed. The EIP process will be optimized by assigning a contact person for each proposal.

An engineer from OpenZeppelin introduced EIP 7819, which aims to simplify the creation and updating of smart contract delegate accounts.

data.title: Aster: Compensation for XPL contract anomalies has now been fully paid out
data.description: Aster announced on the X platform that compensation for the XPL contract anomaly has been fully distributed. All affected users have received compensation directly in USDT. For any further questions, please submit a ticket through the official Discord channel.

data.title: WLFI to begin repo program this week
data.description: World Liberty Financial (WLFI) announced in a post on X that it will begin implementing a buyback program this week using liquidity fee revenue. All buybacks and token burns will be publicly and transparently announced after implementation. Previously, WLFI had approved a proposal to use all fees generated by the protocol's own liquidity to repurchase WLFI tokens in the market and permanently burn them.

Traders have reached a strong consensus on a bearish outlook for ETH and are actively selling ETH put and call options; 3. US regulators are investigating the Strategic Reserve of Cryptocurrency for insider trading; 4. He Yi: CZ does not use WeChat, so be wary of related fake WeChat accounts; 5. Ethereum co-founder Jeffrey Wilcke deposited 1,000 ETH with Kraken; 6. Canada's anti-money laundering agency fined KuCoin's parent company approximately $14.09 million; 7. Bitwise has submitted its S-1 application for the Hyperliquid ETF to the SEC; 10. Cloudflare plans to launch the US dollar-backed stablecoin NET Dollar, designed to provide services for AI; 11. data.title: A whale deposited 6.27 million USDC into HyperLiquid and bought 5.279 million XPL at an average price of $1.89.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale transferred 6.27 million USDC to HyperLiquid, and then bought 5.279 million XPL at an average price of US$1.89.

data.title: Stablecoin protocol Level announced that it has been acquired by a leading DeFi company and will gradually cease operations.
data.description: Level, a yield-generating stablecoin protocol, announced that it has been acquired by a leading DeFi firm, and the Level team will join the protocol in the future. As part of this transition, the Level protocol (including lvlUSD and slvlUSD) will be phased out. All users will be able to unstake slvlUSD and redeem lvlUSD, and all cooldown periods will be shortened to 2 seconds. The last batch of yields will be distributed on October 2, 2025, after which no yield will be generated, regardless of whether the asset remains staked. The front-end interface will remain operational until December 15, 2025, after which users will still be able to unstake and redeem directly through the smart contract.

data.title: The ETH band whale bought 7,632 ETH at an average price of $3,928.66, with some orders placed at $3,955 for profit.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai Yi @ai_9684 xtpa, address 0x54d…e6029 spent approximately $29.985 million five hours ago to purchase 7,632 ETH at an average price of $3,928.66. Subsequently, the address placed a limit sell order on Cowswap for 2,547 ETH at $3,955, aiming to partially take profits after a slight price increase. The corresponding position is estimated to be worth approximately $10 million.
